title: Invisible Helmets
description: Makes helmets and helmet armor trims invisible. It should work on future versions of the game, unless they don't...
body:
I've spent a good while trying to find a resource pack that only removes the helmet of armors instead of the whole armor itself to no avail. So I did it myself! All this pack does is remove the helmet textures as well as their respective armor trims...as well as adding a few miscellaneous things.

It should be able to work on newer versions that arent already listed. I cannot confirm or deny that. Feel free to download a version and find out for yourself :D

_**BEHOLD THE PREVIEWS!!!**_

**Remember that it takes 5 baby turtles to make a helmet that's bigger than all of them combined.**

![Turtle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6582aa9963bd53c33d35fc0c2c47644bc75193a6_0.webp)

**Questionably Obtained Leather Sourced From Various Animals.**

![Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44d28dfb1d077c8ed5b36028f3ca042ad87f73d5_0.webp)

**Copper? Hell, I barely know her!**

![Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c657fc42bc4782ea797a5295be1dc935a1b8385d_0.webp)

**Chainmail? What did he do?**

![Chainmail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c47765c3e7e6f8fe856ba5e155eb547d4169253_0.webp)

**This is basically diamond armor, except it isn't. But you can use your pretend noggin to make believe that it is!**

![Iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f147ad68b3e145522921079384c517431095ecb_0.webp)

**"THE GOLDEN CITY...!! IT REALLY...IT REALLY EXISTS!!"**

![Gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/652e477c6dd90b9c99f46c47a02cc7892a60ad1f_0.webp)

**That Blue Stuff That People go Feral Over.**

![Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22778648e018996ce62410b3515e202e4a2204aa_0.webp)

**Andes-ITE, Dior-ITE, Gran-ITE, are There any OTHER "ITEs" I Should Be Made Aware of?**

![Netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6020a539f185a628bd6680e48bf97a58d6ab86e2_0.webp)
